game.title: Gob
game.short_text: Groggy and hungry, you search for the ingredients of your favorite meal.

details.title: Gob
details.description:
CURRENTLY IN DEVELOPMENTFollow for development updates: https://twitter.com/gammagirlLabs
After a deep slumber, a trip to the vending machine spirals into an unintentional journey underground.
Play as Gob to solve the puzzles of your messy home and trudge through the unseen corners of a cavernous tunnel network. Mash things together, break them apart, and observe the environment to get yourself back home.
Features:
Unique hand-painted artwork
Point and click mechanics, without the pointing and clickingWordless design.

Download the zip file and extract to play application.

game.short_text: A puzzle game where the room constantly shrinks - and you feel like somebody might be watching...
game.title: Claustrophobia

details.title: Claustrophobia
details.description:
Claustrophobia is a game made for the Epic MegaJam 2021 in a week on the theme of Running Out Of Space!
It's my first solo dev project that I've seen through to completion and I'm super happy with how it's come out so far.
In claustrophobia you try to solve puzzles in shrinking rooms of ever growing complexity with clues along the way as to why you're here, and who made all of these puzzles...
Currently the game consists of 10 levels, though more may be planned for after the jam depending on reception.
If you want to chat to me about the game, it's development, or speedrunning it (there's already a couple speedrunners out there!) come and join the discord:
https://discord.gg/rDAcFpFWR for current version (0.5)https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vuN2-n0v6LA&ab_channel=ShaunHowes

game.short_text: An adorable interactive narrative with a roguelike twist
game.title: Pageturner

details.title: Pageturner
details.description:
Join Aviena and Borbu on their journey to Harmonia in this adorable interactive narrative with a roguelike twist. 
  
 
  
Set in the pages of a book and played through whimsical illustrations, you choose how Aviena and Borbu will tackle their challenges! Aviena and Borbu gain modifiers based on your choices, and those modifiers help you in the minigames that follow. If you succeed or fail, your path branches on your journey to Harmonia.
  
 
  
Epic Megajam 2021
  
The game was made in 7 days for the Epic Megajam 2021, with the theme “Running out of space”. 
  
Running Out of Space
  

This game tackles the theme in two ways; the narrative and the reoccurring mechanic.
  
After you make your choice and the minigame begins, the page slowly fills with the words of the story – giving you less and less space to complete your task, akin to a battle royale arena.
  
 
  
What to expect
This was  a game jam game - it is very short and it is more of a demo.  Expect 5-10 minutes of gameplay.
In the game demo, you will get an introduction and three minigames; in a single playthrough you will play two minigames, as the result of the first game dictates which path you then take. Even though Pageturner is a small demo with only three minigames, there are actually 18 variations of the game and four endings based on your modifier selections and the minigame outcomes.
Expect bugs! Again, a game jam game has many bugs. Be kind to them!
What's next? Check our Devlog below for updates on what we're up to!

 
 
Controls
  
Play Pageturner with your keyboard using WASD and SPACE.
  

 
  
Credits
  
Gameplay Design
Cari Watterton & Scott Simpson
Gameplay Programming
Scott Simpson
UI Art, Design & Code:
Cari Watterton
Narration & Writing
James Gardner
Music & Sound Effects
We Love Indies (sponsor of Epic Megajam)

 
  
Special Thanks:
  
James Clayton for Tech Support!


Aviena & Borbu Character Concepts

game.short_text: User-caused file influx can cause the crash anytime now! Let's gather files and upload them to the cloud server.
game.title: BotiBoi

details.title: BotiBoi
details.description:
Gameplay Instructions:
Help BotiBoi gather as many files as possible and upload them to the server before the inevitable system crash. Be quick and avoid bumpers and bugs. Compete with your friends for the highest spot on the high-score table. 

Controls:

[WSAD]    to move around

[SPACE]    to jump and double jump

[L.SHIFT]    to dash and double dash
[LMB] or [E]    to upload

[ESC] or [P]    to pause
We are deeply, sorry but name of the zip is Windows.zip, please be mindful of that.Unzip and run mysterius.exe

details.title: Underquest
details.description:
Real-time inventory management roguelite. Combine items to create powerful skills and use them in fast-paced combat. Explore randomly generated dungeons in the Underkingdom and discover the secrets of its inhabitants!
Use left mouse click or drag&drop in the bag to apply or move them.
Combine two segments to forge the skill.
Upgrade your equipment by forging the same items with equal quality.

The game has been released and is available on Steam. There is also a free demo version of the game available. We would love to hear your thoughts and stay tuned for new updates!
https://store.steampowered.com/widget/2265420/

game.short_text: Guide a rescue operation in proximity of a black hole in VR.
game.title: Running out of Space-Time

details.title: Running out of Space-Time
details.description:
Team
DevDuo made of Raio and SirMiloMilo.
Gameplay
Guide rescue ships to the space station through asteroids and debris, take on board the survivors and escape through an intergalactic portal.
Oh, BTW, there's a giant black hole nearby that is going to annihilate every life form on the space station, so hurry up, you don't have much time!
P.S. rescue ships are very fragile, they will insta-explode when touching something, so just keep them away from anything that is not a dock or a portal.
To draw a path put your hand (little sphere) on a rescue ship, press trigger and move the hand.
Platfom
Windows
Tested on Oculus Rift and Oculus Rift S. 
Should work on Quest with Oculus Link.
Could work on Vive and Index.
External content
SFX & Music from weloveindiesGargantua black-hole based on the one by brunogbrito.Explosion based on Explosions BuilderHumanoid mesh based on one in Polygon prototypeHumanoid anims from MixamoSkysphere from StarSphere

Gameplay footage


Unzip and run "RunningOutOfSpace.exe"

game.short_text: Surreal VR platformer inside of an RGB keyboard
game.title: In SPACE no one can hear you CLICK

details.title: In SPACE no one can hear you CLICK
details.description:
Enter an experimental keyboard and run out of the space bar, testing the keys you find along the way.
Oculus Quest version with achievements and leaderboards available on AppLab! People in our discord are speedrunning the game. Can you complete it in under 2 minutes?
This is a VR-only game. Don't have a headset? Watch a full playthrough here!
Controls:Swing your arms and push off objects to move around (like in Gorilla Tag). Press the left Menu / B key to restart from the last checkpoint.
Made for the 2021 Epic MegaJam  with the "Running out of space" theme.
Supported platforms: The game has been tested with  HTC Vive Pro using SteamVR, Oculus Quest 2 - standalone and using  Oculus Link. Should probably run with any SteamVR-compatible headset. 
Join our Discord server to share your feedback, suggestions or chat about VR dev stuff! https://discord.gg/d7gqjtKQm4

details.title: Oogies Spacepark
details.description:
Team
Programmers
Wouter De Moor
Oliver Lambreghts
Enzo Mannaert
Artists
Yvette Kooke
Antijn Van Der Gun
Game summary
You are stuck in an abandoned theme park in the middle of the night, there is no power and no way out. You walk through the park hoping to find a way out, but wait.. you are not alone! An alien mascot is patrolling around the park hungry for human blood, and he has smelled yours. The mascot does not like to be filmed,  luckily you brought your camera with you but you only have one memory card so you'll better use your memory wisely.

Controls

Walk around using "W" "A" "S" "D"Start recording by holding "RIGHT MOUS BUTTON"
Look around using your mouse
Interact with items with "E"
Turn your flashlight on/off "F"Reload memory card "R"

game.short_text: Follow the story of an old man struggling with hoarding  through the eyes of a rat trying to keep its baby safe
game.title: The Rat Way Home

details.title: The Rat Way Home
details.description:
Follow the tragic story of an old man as he struggles to keep his fading memories, running out of space within his own mind. Play through the consequences of his illness by traversing his hoarded house, making your way through the many dangers it contains. You play as a rat mom in search of food and a safe haven for your child, traveling through a house that has quite literally ran out of space.

The way we thought of running out of space is threefold:
1. The old man is running out of space for memory, he is sick with dementia and struggles with it.

2. The old man is hoarding due to his dementia, cluttering up the space in the apartment.

3. The rat is running out of space to move, as obstacles are closing in.

 "The Rat Way Home" is a Game Jam submission built in Unreal Engine 4 for the Epic MegaJam 2021 contest. It was built by a group of 3 friends, and it's a story of adventure and heartbreak, but also one of hope and family. We have an immense passion for games, and we poured our hearts into the vision of "The Rat Way Home". Hope you enjoy the journey!

game.short_text: Build beautiful container cities in the middle of ocean.
game.title: Container City

details.title: Container City
details.description:
Build eco-friendly habitats on the sea out of containers and solar panels. Welcome to the city of the future!
The game has 3 distinct levels:Cairo - the city of pyramids, is the most beginner-friendly and comes with an interactive tutorial.Paris - the city of love, has a strange foundation shape that encourages organic buildings.New York - the city of opportunities, has a really tiny foundation, that provides quite a lot of challenges.Building Blocks:
1. Containers - main building blocks of any city. Use Q and E to rotate and lock them securely. One container fits 4 people.2. Solar Panel - containers alone are inhabitable. Attach solar panels to provide a cosy living space.3. Cables - are versatile tools, they can connect multiple containers and share energy between them. They can also be secured to the platform providing more stability to tall structures.4. Buoys - initially the foundation is stable enough to support many containers. But it becomes unstable once the mass gets too high. Add Buoys to lift more weight and avoid dipping.Enjoy the relaxing view and gameplay!
